title: Section 439
content: No court inferior to that of 1[Metropolitan Magistrate or a, Judicial Magistrate of the first class] shall try any offence under this Act or any rule or regulation thereunder.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 12 of 1983, s. 17 and the Schedule, for "presidency magistrate or a magistrate of the first class" (w.e.f.18-5-1983).
